title: About SkyDeck.ai
description: Learn more about SkyDeck.ai and our team.
html:
Meet the team!

Lawrence W. Sinclair

CEO & Founder

Get to know Lawrence Sinclair, our CEO and Founder. A tech entrepreneur, Lawrence founded SkyDeck AI Inc. in June 2023 to shake up the traditional workplace by integrating rapidly evolving AI tools and agents. Now, he's launching Rememberizer AI, a complementary service to inject knowledge into AI applications and OpenAI GPTs. Today, he is all in on generative AI.

LinkedIn · GitHub · Twitter

Gary C. Tate

CRO & Co-Founder

Meet Gary, the force driving Rememberizer AI and SkyDeck.ai as our Co-Founder and CRO. Gary is a seasoned executive with a lifelong passion for technology and a leadership career spanning 35 years. He's all about leveraging his technical, go-to-market, and leadership skills to face new challenges and drive impactful change in the tech world. Generative AI is his new passion.

LinkedIn · Twitter

The work we love

SkyDeck AI has been spun out of the software engineering firm East Agile after years of R&D in GPT model training and AI and business tool development. The SkyDeck team consists of CEO Lawrence W. Sinclair, CRO Gary C. Tate, and a team of data scientists and engineers. We are mostly a distributed team with our headquarters in San Jose, California.

  • OVER 100 YEARS OF EXPERIENCE — Lawrence, Gary and the East Agile team bring 100+ years of combined industry knowledge.
  • AI APPLICATION DEVELOPMENT — Expert in building business applications, AI applications and customization.
  • CUSTOMIZATION — Custom build and tune the integration of Rememberizer AI into your business or application.
